task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar or project explorer.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Air-Side HVAC system parameters for the Top Floor (T.*) systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST interface shows the Air-Side HVAC system component tree or spreadsheet view, specifically displaying the top floor systems (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35).

task_completion.description: Update COOLING-EIR to 0.28571 for all 5 top floor systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cooling EIR' (or equivalent cooling efficiency input ratio) field is set to 0.28571 for the T.* PSZ systems in the properties window or spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Update FURNACE-HIR to 1.11111 for all 5 top floor systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Furnace HIR' (or equivalent heating input ratio) field is set to 1.11111 for the T.* PSZ systems in the properties window or spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Update SUPPLY-EFF to 0.65 for all 5 top floor systems
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Supply Fan Efficiency' (or equivalent fan efficiency) field is set to 0.65 for the T.* PSZ systems in the properties window or spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress dialog, simulation complete message, or the viewing of simulation output/results indicating the DOE-2.2 simulation was executed.
The File menu is opened with 'Save' selected, clicking a save icon, or the absence of an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to the project name after modifications.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with eQUEST dialogs and spreadsheets, not a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) editing the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: The simulation was run through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation must be triggered via the eQUEST interface (e.g., clicking the 'Simulate' button), showing the actual eQUEST calculation dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing 'sed', 'awk', or python scripts being used to batch replace values in the building model files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target building is '4StoreyBuilding'. There are exactly 5 top-floor PSZ systems that must be modified: T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, and T.C35. The target values to verify in the eQUEST interface are COOLING-EIR = 0.28571, FURNACE-HIR = 1.11111, and SUPPLY-EFF = 0.65. The original baseline values were COOLING-EIR=0.34565, FURNACE-HIR=1.24069, and SUPPLY-EFF=0.53. A full annual DOE-2.2 simulation must be executed after the changes.
